sample_harms.andrew_quote: Verified Chronology of Procedural Violations (Pigors v. Watson, 2023–2025) Executive Summary  Overview: Since October 1, 2023, Plaintiff Andrew J. Pigors (“Father”) has experienced numerous procedural and legal violations in the Muskegon County custody case Pigors v. Watson (No. 24-01507-DC). These violations range from improper ex parte orders that suspended Father’s parenting time without the required affidavits or findings, to failures of due process such as delayed hearings, lack of notice,
sample_harms.constitutional_violation: MCL 600.5720 — Retaliatory eviction; Fair Housing Act

Use these verbatim.  # Verified Chronology & Bias Manifest — Recital Script (Pigors v. Watson, 2023–2025)  ## A.
